name: amazon-in-marketplace-mcp
description: Search Amazon.in, read your orders, and analyze order trends via a persistent Playwright browser session.
long_description: An unofficial, personal-use MCP server for Amazon.in. It drives a single persistent Playwright/Chromium session (your login is saved to an on-disk profile) to search products, list and open your orders, and compute spend trends. There is no official consumer order API — this reads the same pages you see. Not affiliated with Amazon.

headless.title: Run headless (no visible browser window)
headless.description: When on, the browser runs invisibly. Turn off if order pages start showing CAPTCHAs so you can solve them. You can also switch at runtime with the set_browser_mode tool.

idle_ms.title: Idle auto-close (milliseconds)
idle_ms.description: How long the browser stays open with no activity before closing itself. 0 keeps it open indefinitely.

tools.name: login_status
tools.description: Check whether you are signed in to Amazon.in, or blocked by a CAPTCHA/sign-in wall.

tools.name: get_browser_state
tools.description: Report current browser mode (headless/headed), whether a browser is open, idle timeout, and profile dir.

tools.name: set_browser_mode
tools.description: Switch the browser between headless and headed at runtime.

tools.name: search_items
tools.description: Search Amazon.in for products; returns title, price, rating, ASIN and URL.

tools.name: list_orders
tools.description: List your recent Amazon.in orders (requires sign-in).

tools.name: get_order
tools.description: Open one order's detail page by order id and return its contents.

tools.name: analyze_order_trends
tools.description: Compute spend trends: total spend, average order value, spend by month, top items, biggest orders.
